name: Penicillin Pizza
recipeIngredient: Yellow, red, and green food coloring
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the muffins and place them on an ungreased cookie sheet, ensuring they do not touch.
2. Spoon a thin layer of sauce onto each muffin, then cover with shredded cheese. Set aside.
3. In a small bowl, mix the Parmesan cheese with yellow, red, and green food coloring until it is evenly mold-green. Use a plastic bag to avoid staining your fingers. Set aside.
4. With an adult's help, broil the pizzas in the oven until the cheese has melted and browned slightly. Remove from the oven and let cool for about 1 minute.
5. Carefully sprinkle the mold on top of the hot pizzas. Allow them to cool slightly before serving. Serves 6.
